title: Python memory report JSON runtime delegate reduction

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Reduce the generated memory report runtime delegate by generating the non-verbose JSON tiny report payload from codegen-owned TOML-table count machinery, while preserving verbose/text behavior through the explicit source fallback.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to memory.report.report JSON non-verbose behavior; do not claim memory report is portable, do not rewrite verbose/text report behavior, and do not broaden into route-report/current/prompt/lifecycle commands.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Bounded decomposition, touched-path narrowing, validation tightening, and plan-local residue routing.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Add a schema-backed generated runtime override for memory report JSON non-verbose, bind memory.report.report to it, regenerate outputs, tighten inventory/static proof, and validate conformance.
completion_criteria: memory.report.report keeps a generated-operation route while the generated _load_memory_report projection handles the non-verbose JSON tiny report path before falling back to the source memory.report.load implementation for verbose/text behavior.
Generated memory runtime owns the tiny JSON report payload construction through schema-backed generated code and uses source fallback only for verbose/text report behavior.
Static proof and inventory describe remaining memory.report behavior as domain/runtime debt, not portable primitive completion.
Freshness, static proof, Python/Node conformance, memory tests, Docker conformance, and stale-reference checks pass.

delegation_outcome_feedback.expected savings: Reusable read-only audit confirmed the generated-local override path and avoided broadening into python.function.call or full report behavior.
delegation_outcome_feedback.actual friction: The first generated target-root implementation missed memory's ambiguous-root behavior; package tests caught it and the generated helper now raises RepoDetectionError with the compact CLI path.
delegation_outcome_feedback.quality concern: The operation still has explicit package-domain fallback for verbose/text behavior and must not be counted as full portable memory.report coverage.
delegation_outcome_feedback.decomposition adjustment: Record this as another runtime delegate reduction, not #892 completion.

proof_report.validation proof: All selected freshness, static, conformance, memory, Docker, and focused pytest checks passed after the ambiguous-root fix.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Generated memory_runtime.py contains _tiny_memory_report_payload_from_toml_table_counts; _tiny_memory_report_fast is absent from generated memory runtime and source runtime_primitives.py; generated package static proof, Python/Node conformance, memory tests, focused pytest tests, and Docker proofs passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Create a bounded plan for Python memory report JSON runtime delegate reduction.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: For this bounded slice, memory.report JSON non-verbose tiny output is generated from manifest TOML counts while source fallback remains for verbose/text behavior. The larger #892 epic remains open.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: generated memory.report JSON non-verbose tiny payload construction and retired the source-only _tiny_memory_report_fast helper

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The slice removes one tiny JSON source-runtime path but keeps memory.report verbose/text behavior as explicit package-domain fallback and does not complete #892.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Generated tiny memory report helper is present, source _tiny_memory_report_fast is absent, target-root ambiguity behavior is preserved, and the planned proof suite passed.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A future proof finds _tiny_memory_report_fast reintroduced, generated memory.report JSON non-verbose calls the source fast path, or this slice is used as evidence of full portable memory.report completion.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
signals found: Generated target-root helper initially drifted from memory package ambiguous-root semantics.
signals fixed: Generated TOML-table helper now detects nested repo candidates and raises RepoDetectionError so generated CLI error handling preserves compact usage output.

continuation: Continue #892 by shrinking the next generated memory/planning/workspace source runtime delegate while keeping product-domain boundaries explicit.
